commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore send-policy ordering and add the denied /stop regression without changing the stale-provider fix direction.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete send-policy ordering regression that can let blocked sessions reach chat abort behavior.; Review finding: [P1] Keep stop commands behind send policy — src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts:2996 (sha=7f9161c72d8971f96e4c9ab67219f7e3e37b5e2b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds catalog-aware validation for persisted session model/provider routes and wires `chat.send` to fall back to the current default when a saved provider is no longer visible.

PR surface: Source +154, Tests +488. Total +642 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection reproduces the PR blocker: at PR head the `/stop` branch returns before `resolveSendPolicy`, while current main rejects denied sends before `/stop`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore send-policy ordering and add the denied `/stop` regression without changing the stale-provider fix direction.
